chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1324 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application 4. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Mr. Waheed Ahmed Awan, Advocate for Petitioner ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner does not press present Petition stating that he would avail appropriate remedy before the concerned forum under the Notification dated 21.10.2024 issued by the Government of Sindh, Revenue Department. In view of above, present Petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with application listed at serial No.3. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
